title: One Piece
description: Monkey D. Luffy sets out on a journey to find the legendary One Piece and become the Pirate King.

title: Solo Leveling
description: The weakest hunter on Earth gains the ability to level up without limit.

title: Tower of God
description: A boy chases his friend into a mysterious tower where his greatest desires await.

title: Soul Land
description: Tang San awakens twin martial spirits and rises through the academies of Douluo Continent.

title: Re:Zero − Starting Life in Another World
description: Subaru is transported to a fantasy world where dying resets him to a checkpoint.

title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
description: An elven mage outlives her hero party and sets out to truly understand humanity.

title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
description: The only reader of a long-running web novel finds himself inside its apocalyptic finale.

title: Chainsaw Man
description: Denji fuses with his chainsaw devil dog and is conscripted into Tokyo's devil hunters.
